grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/05บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03/บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03_หน้า00_gridline.json

elements.description: ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 +3.75, ระดับคานหลังคา +6.65 (height chain 0.60 + 3.15 + 2.90 = 6.65)
window opening tagged circled '1', upper floor, left side (near grid4)
twin window openings tagged hexagon '3' side by side, upper floor, center (near grid3-2) -- same W3 awning-type windows seen on รูปด้าน 2 (หน้า10)
window opening tagged hexagon '4', upper floor, right of center (near grid2)
window opening tagged hexagon '4', ground floor, left-center
window opening tagged circled '1', ground floor, right of center (near grid1)

The ground-line profile on the right side of this elevation (near grid1) steps down in two increments from the building's ±0.00 floor level to grade before reaching the drawn ground line -- consistent with the ST1 entrance-stair feature identified 2.05m south of grid A on the ground floor plan (หน้า06) and cross-confirmed on รูปด้าน 2 (หน้า10)'s own dimension chain, viewed here from a third angle.

Four 'เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC' reveal-line notes/leader lines pointing to various points on the facade (upper-left near roof-beam, upper-right at the setback corner, lower-left at the upper-floor level line, lower-right at the ground-floor level line)
Small triangle symbols each containing '1', below the window_3 pair and below the window_4_lower window -- same recurring unidentified marker convention seen on รูปด้าน 1/2.

warnings: This elevation shows the grid numbers in reverse reading order (4,3,2,1 left to right) since it is viewed from the opposite side of รูปด้าน 1 (A-07) -- the bottom dimension chain '0.80+0.50 | 3.00 | 2.00 | 4.00 | 0.60+0.70' bracketed '1.30 | 9.00 | 1.30' still matches the master grid's x_lines (1=0.0,2=4.0,3=6.0,4=9.0) exactly, just traversed right-to-left.

The building footprint/facade steps back partway up the right side of this elevation (near grid1) -- the upper floor's wall plane sits further back (recessed) than the ground floor's, consistent with the ground-floor จอดรถ (carport, open bay) extending further toward grid1 than the enclosed upper-floor rooms above it, as seen on the floor plans (หน้า06/07).

This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '3' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-09) -- cardinal direction not independently confirmed from this sheet alone, only the sheet-to-slot mapping.

This is the 3rd of 4 elevations cross-confirming the 2.05m ST1 entrance-stair offset south of grid A/near grid1 (see รูปด้าน 2's more explicit dimensioned confirmation, _หน้า10_elevation2.json) via its own stepped ground-profile line, though without an explicit printed dimension value on this particular sheet.
